name: Hunt the 5K
stimulus: 5K-specific speed. Track intervals at race pace. Zwift races for bike intensity. Long run maintains endurance. Target: sub 17:30.
goals: Parkrun or time trial at end of block

planned.desc:
AM: Easy run 8km + 6x100m strides
PM: Strength 40min
Explosive: jump squats 3x5, bounding 3x6
Core + hip stability
planned.notes: Speed block starts. Strides should feel FAST.

planned.desc:
TRACK — 5K pace reps
WU: 2km + drills + 3x100m
MAIN: 5x1km @ 3:28-3:32
(90sec jog recovery)
CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: THE session. This is your race pace. Smooth, relaxed, fast.

planned.desc:
Recovery run 7km
Super easy, shake out the track

Zwift race — B or A category
WU: 15min
RACE: 30-45min FULL GAS
CD: 10min spin
planned.notes: Race hard on the bike. This is your Thursday intensity — no running needed.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy run 7km
PM: Mobility 20min

Long run 18km
km 1-12 @ 5:00
km 13-15 @ 4:40
km 16-18 @ 4:20-4:30
Negative split — finish flying
planned.notes: Long run with fast finish. The last 3km should feel like you're racing.

planned.desc:
Long ride 2.5-3hrs
Outdoor — easy Z2
Or Zwift social ride
Just spin. Recovery from long run.

AM: Easy run 8km + 6x strides
PM: Strength 40min
Plyometrics: depth jumps, bounds
Core + ankle strength

TRACK — 800m reps
WU: 2km + drills
MAIN: 6x800m @ 2:44-2:48
(400m jog recovery — 2min)
CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Faster than race pace. Builds VO2max. Should be hard but not dying.

planned.desc:
Recovery run 7km
OR recovery spin 45min
(pick what your body needs)
planned.notes: Listen to your legs. If they're heavy, ride instead.

planned.desc:
Tempo + speed
WU: 2km easy
MAIN SET 1: 3km tempo @ 3:58-4:05
(3min jog)
MAIN SET 2: 4x400m @ 78-80sec
(200m jog)
CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Combo session: tempo for endurance, 400s for turnover. This is a hard day.

planned.desc:
Recovery spin
60min Z1
Flat, easy, spin out the legs
planned.notes: You did 2 hard days in 3. Rest the running legs.
Building toward 10K strength. Last 6km is the workout.

planned.desc:
Endurance ride 2-2.5hrs
Outdoor or Zwift
Z2 with 3x5min Z3 surges
planned.notes: Not flat easy — include some effort. Building bike fitness.

planned.desc:
Easy run 7km
Absorb week — back off
planned.notes: Recovery week. Let the speed soak in.

planned.desc:
TRACK — sharpener
WU: 2km + drills
MAIN: 3x1km @ 3:25-3:30
(2min jog)
+ 2x400m @ 76-78sec
(200m jog)
CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: FASTER than race pace. Short reps. Feel the speed. Don't chase, just flow.

planned.desc: Easy run 6km

Zwift — easy group ride
60min Z2
No racing this week

Pre-race shakeout
4km easy + 4x100m strides
+ 2x200m at 5K pace
planned.notes: Tomorrow you race. Feel sharp. Sleep well.

planned.desc:
5K TIME TRIAL or PARKRUN
WU: 2km easy + 4x100m
RACE: 5km — target 17:30
Plan: 3:28-3:30 per km
Don't go out in 3:20!
CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: First test. Even splits. If you're under 17:30, we're on track.

planned.desc:
Recovery spin
60min Z1
Celebrate or regroup
planned.notes: Speed 1 done. How did the 5K feel? Report back.
